title: cynoglossum zeylanicum var. lanceolatum
intro: Cynoglossum zeylanicum var. lanceolatum, also known as the Ceylon hound's tongue, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka, characterized by its lance-shaped leaves and a distinctive shape. The medicinal properties of Cynoglossum zeylanicum var. lanceolatum include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Cynoglossum zeylanicum var. lanceolatum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and can be consumed internally or used topically as a paste to harness its medicinal properties.
